summary: Client surfaces ANY in-body jsonCode >= 400 (returned with HTTP 200) as an error — 407 session-expired, 400 bad policyID, 403 permission, 666 referer, etc.
reason: Expensify carries the real status in jsonCode, not the HTTP status; a 2xx HTTP alone is not success. Surfacing only 407 left mutating commands (quick/from-line/bulk/create) printing a false 'Created expense…' when the API rejected the request. Fixed at the client layer so every command benefits.
validated_outcome: verify mock (no jsonCode) still PASS 27/27; live 407 surfaces as a clear re-auth error.
